name: github-insight-analyzer
description: A full-stack GitHub user statistics and insight analyzer.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
